policies.title: Refund eligibility for PBT services

sections.Summary: We allow refunds for clear billing errors or service outages within the last 30 days.
sections.When it applies: Use this policy when a customer requests a refund for PBT services.
sections.Rules:
- Refunds require evidence of a billing mistake or documented outage.
- Partial refunds are preferred when only part of the service was impacted.
- Refunds beyond 30 days need escalation approval.
sections.Allowed actions:
- Approve full refunds for billing errors within 30 days.
- Approve partial refunds for limited outages within 30 days.
sections.Disallowed actions:
- Grant refunds without documented evidence.
- Approve refunds beyond 30 days without escalation.
sections.Required wording: "I can help with a refund for a verified billing issue or outage within the last 30 days."
sections.Escalation: Escalate to the Support Lead for exceptions or refunds beyond 30 days.
sections.Examples: A customer was double-charged last week. Approve a full refund for the duplicate charge.

policies.raw_markdown:
---
policy_id: REF-001
title: "Refund eligibility for PBT services"
status: active
type: perpetual
domain: merchandise
effective_from: 2025-01-01
effective_to:
priority: 2
owner_team: "Policy Ops"
approvers:
  - "Head of Support"
jurisdiction:
  - "Global"
applies_to:
  - "Support agents"
tags:
  - "refunds"
  - "support"
---

# Summary
We allow refunds for clear billing errors or service outages within the last 30 days.

# When it applies
Use this policy when a customer requests a refund for PBT services.

# Rules
- Refunds require evidence of a billing mistake or documented outage.
- Partial refunds are preferred when only part of the service was impacted.
- Refunds beyond 30 days need escalation approval.

# Allowed actions
- Approve full refunds for billing errors within 30 days.
- Approve partial refunds for limited outages within 30 days.

# Disallowed actions
- Grant refunds without documented evidence.
- Approve refunds beyond 30 days without escalation.

# Required wording
"I can help with a refund for a verified billing issue or outage within the last 30 days."

# Escalation
Escalate to the Support Lead for exceptions or refunds beyond 30 days.

# Examples
A customer was double-charged last week. Approve a full refund for the duplicate charge.

policies.title: Temporary waiver for holiday surge response

sections.Summary: During the holiday surge, agents may waive one late fee per customer.
sections.When it applies: Use this policy when handling support tickets related to late fees during the surge period.
sections.Rules:
- Only one late fee waiver per customer during the effective period.
- Document the waiver in the ticket notes.
sections.Allowed actions:
- Waive a single late fee for eligible customers.
- Communicate the waiver and remaining balance.
sections.Disallowed actions:
- Waive multiple late fees for the same customer.
- Apply the waiver outside the effective dates.
sections.Required wording: "As a one-time courtesy during the holiday surge, I can waive this late fee."
sections.Escalation: Escalate if the customer requests additional waivers or exceptions.
sections.Examples: A customer incurred a late fee on 2026-01-12. Waive the fee and note the exception.

policies.raw_markdown:
---
policy_id: TEMP-2026-01-EXAMPLE
title: "Temporary waiver for holiday surge response"
status: active
type: temporary
domain: merchandise
effective_from: 2026-01-10
effective_to: 2026-02-15
priority: 1
owner_team: "Policy Ops"
approvers:
  - "Head of Support"
jurisdiction:
  - "Global"
applies_to:
  - "Support agents"
tags:
  - "temporary"
  - "surge"
---

# Summary
During the holiday surge, agents may waive one late fee per customer.

# When it applies
Use this policy when handling support tickets related to late fees during the surge period.

# Rules
- Only one late fee waiver per customer during the effective period.
- Document the waiver in the ticket notes.

# Allowed actions
- Waive a single late fee for eligible customers.
- Communicate the waiver and remaining balance.

# Disallowed actions
- Waive multiple late fees for the same customer.
- Apply the waiver outside the effective dates.

# Required wording
"As a one-time courtesy during the holiday surge, I can waive this late fee."

# Escalation
Escalate if the customer requests additional waivers or exceptions.

# Examples
A customer incurred a late fee on 2026-01-12. Waive the fee and note the exception.
